summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Notification System, Admin User Management, and Onboarding Flow. All features are working correctly: 1) Onboarding flow redirects to /auth with 'Complete Your Profile' form showing preferences, 2) Notification bell visible and functional in all three dashboards (Student, Teacher, Admin), 3) Admin User Management has working filters (role, status, date range), search, and Excel export.
critical_code_review_comments: UserManagement.js could benefit from data-testid attributes on filter dropdowns for easier automated testing
seed_data_creation: Created test users (student, teacher, admin) with sessions for dashboard testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All notification and admin user management features tested and working. Key findings: 1) Notification bell has data-testid='notification-bell' in all dashboards, 2) Notification API endpoints all return 200 status, 3) Admin /api/admin/users/all supports role, search, date_from, date_to parameters, 4) Onboarding flow correctly saves preferences to localStorage and displays them in profile form.
